sections.sectionTitle: Thuciamna Singkuang Jerusalem-ah Paipih Ding David in Pulak

verses.text: David in a tul-a ukte leh a za-a ukte leh a makai khempeuh tawh thu kikupna khat nei hi

Tua ciangin David in Israel a kikhawm khempeuhte kiangah, “Note in kilawm na sak uh a, Topa i Pasian' deihna ahih leh, eite' kiangah hong pai theihna dingun Israel gam sungah a omlai i sanggamte leh lonona gam a nei khuapi sunga om siampite leh Levi mite a sam dingin mi sawl ni
Tua ciangin Thuciamna Singkuang eite kiangah lakik ni; bang hang hiam cih leh Saul' hun lai-in i don kei hi,” a ci hi
Mi khempeuh in tua thu hoihsa uh ahih manin tua bangin hih ding a kikhawm mi khempeuh a thukim uh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Thuciamna Singkuang A La David Pai

verses.text: Tua ahih ciangin Kiriathjearim panin Pasian' Thuciamna Singkuang a ciahpih dingin David in Egypt gam Shihor lui panin Hamath lutna ciangdong Israel mi khempeuh a khawm hi
Tua ciangin David leh Israel mi khempeuh, kherub-te' tungah a tu Topa' min tawh a kilo Pasian' Thuciamna Singkuang a paipihto dingin Kiriathjearim a kici Baalah-ah a paito uh hi
Amaute in Abinadab' inn panin leeng thak khat tungah Pasian' Thuciamna Singkuang pua uh a, Uzza leh Ahio in a leeng a hawl uh hi
Tua ciangin David leh Israel mi khempeuh in Pasian' mai-ah la leh laia lasakna, harp lasakna, khuangneute, daltuahte, leh peengkulte tawh a tha neih zahun gualnopna a bawl uh hi
Amaute Khidon' ancilna phual a tun' uh ciangin bawngtalte muktu ahih manin Uzza in Thuciamna Singkuang a len dingin a khut va zan kha hi
Tua ciangin Uzza tungah Topa heh hi. Amah in a khut tawh Thuciamna Singkuang sukha ahih manin Topa in amah vat hi. Tua ciangin Pasian' mai tua lai-ah amah si hi
Uzza tungah Topa hehin gim pia ahih manin David zong a heh suak hi. Tua mun pen tuni dongin Perezuzza kici hi
Tua ni-in David in Pasian kihta hi. Amah in, “Pasian' Thuciamna Singkuang kei kiang inn-ah bangci ciahpih theih ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin David in Thuciamna Singkuang David khuapi a inn-ah ciahpihlo a, Gath mi Obededom' inn-ah va koih hi
Tua ahih ciangin Pasian' Thuciamna Singkuang Obededom' innkuan tawh kha thum sung om hi. Topa in Obededom' innkuan leh a neih khempeuh thupha a pia hi.
